evidence_quotes.quote: the game servers were shut down on April 8 2015

paragraphs.text: Hello, I have been a gamer for the past 15 years of my life and it is a fantastic hobby that I enjoy in my free time. Over those years I have played through many singleplayer and online games. Sadly some of the online games I and my friends used to play are no longer supported and the servers are shut down. For example we played a game called "Lost Saga" published at the time by "Nexon Europe". "Lost Saga" is a platformer fighting game, sadly the game servers were shut down on April 8 2015 and there have been no official servers since then, so we haven't played the game in years. I miss the game and would've liked to preserve the game in some form, to get back in and to brawl with other players. Regrettably I can't do anything about that game, but I want to have the option with games that are out now.
